title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2026
summary:
Main
Dalian iron ore futures traded with a firm bias during today's daytime session. Prices experienced a rapid surge in the afternoonbefore retracing slightly from their highs. The main contract, DCE I2605, eventually closed at 801 RMB/mt, representing an increase of 0.69% compared to the previous trading day.
